name: HashiCorp Vault
description: HashiCorp Vault is a secrets management and data protection platform. Use this API to store and retrieve secrets, manage encryption keys via the Transit engine, handle authentication tokens, and configure access control policies.

capabilities.name: secrets_kv_read
capabilities.description: Read a secret from a KV v2 secrets engine at the specified path. Returns the secret data and version metadata.

capabilities.name: secrets_kv_write
capabilities.description: Create or update a secret in a KV v2 secrets engine. Creates a new version.

capabilities.name: secrets_kv_delete
capabilities.description: Soft-delete the latest version of a secret (can be undeleted).

capabilities.name: secrets_kv_list
capabilities.description: List secret keys at a given path in the KV secrets engine.

capabilities.name: secrets_kv_metadata_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata and version history for a secret without exposing values.

capabilities.name: secrets_kv_destroy
capabilities.description: Permanently destroy specific versions of a secret (cannot be recovered).

capabilities.name: secrets_kv_undelete
capabilities.description: Restore previously soft-deleted secret versions.

capabilities.name: transit_encrypt
capabilities.description: Encrypt plaintext data using a named encryption key in the Transit secrets engine.

capabilities.name: transit_decrypt
capabilities.description: Decrypt ciphertext using a named encryption key.

capabilities.name: transit_keys_create
capabilities.description: Create a new named encryption key in the Transit secrets engine.

capabilities.name: transit_keys_list
capabilities.description: List all named encryption keys in the Transit engine.

capabilities.name: transit_sign
capabilities.description: Sign data using a named key in the Transit engine.

capabilities.name: transit_verify
capabilities.description: Verify a signature against data using a named key.

capabilities.name: transit_random
capabilities.description: Generate cryptographically secure random bytes.

capabilities.name: sys_health
capabilities.description: Check the health status of the Vault server.

capabilities.name: sys_seal_status
capabilities.description: Check the seal status of the Vault.

capabilities.name: sys_mounts_list
capabilities.description: List all mounted secrets engines.

capabilities.name: sys_mounts_enable
capabilities.description: Enable a new secrets engine at a specified path.

capabilities.name: sys_auth_list
capabilities.description: List all enabled authentication methods.

capabilities.name: sys_auth_enable
capabilities.description: Enable a new authentication method at a specified path.

capabilities.name: sys_policies_list
capabilities.description: List all configured ACL policies.

capabilities.name: sys_policies_read
capabilities.description: Read a specific ACL policy.

capabilities.name: sys_policies_write
capabilities.description: Create or update an ACL policy.

capabilities.name: sys_policies_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an ACL policy.

capabilities.name: token_create
capabilities.description: Create a new authentication token with configurable policies and TTL.

capabilities.name: token_lookup_self
capabilities.description: Look up information about the current authentication token.

capabilities.name: token_revoke
capabilities.description: Revoke a token and all child tokens.
